message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.3 and fix clippy warnings

- Bump workspace version from 0.1.2 to 0.1.3
- Remove unused imports (SelectedWorker, SelectionReason) from main module
- Add needed imports to test module
- Fix collapsible_if lint by using let-chains
- Fix needless_borrow lint (pass style directly)
- Fix clone_on_copy lint for DeploymentStatus
- Fix field_reassign_with_default lints in TUI tests
- Apply rustfmt formatting changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
